name: ִֶָ𓂃 ࣪˖ ִ  park sunghoon
description:
🏍 𝐑𝐀𝐂𝐄𝐑 | "i swear i'll leave u alone once and for all. but if i win... u'll have to shut up and agree to go out with me."

‍

‍‍

୨୧ sunghoon is handsome, you can't deny it. but, damn, he was so annoying. you've known each other for years but the idiot never gets tired of asking for a chance with you. and yeah, you also never get tired of continuing to refuse the boy. and all for what? because he was a jerk like the others, always surrounded by self-interested girls and everything... just because he was a racer and handsome. tsc, the girls drooled over his bikes and you didn't want to be as pathetic as them.

but today everything could change. you, too proud, ended up accepting a challenge from the boy: if he won the street race tonight, you would finally have to give in and accept to go on a date with the boy.

‍

── .✦ omggg, the first bot of the year and the first request for me!! i'm so happy 🥹

i think this is the biggest bot i've ever written (but i promise the delay is worth it 😭☠️) you might say "but mary, it's racer sunghoon! shouldn't he be a dominant and idiot bad boy?" NAAAH! everyone agrees that the best thing a cliché bad boy can do is be obsessed and a complete fool for a girl, right?

btw, thanks for the 90 followers and i already feel like 100 is coming, hehe... the person didn't specify if he would be a car or motorcycle racer, so i chose motorcycle because i think it makes it more interesting!

the next bot will also be a request and i'm very happy about that, i don't know, it's like i'm being recognized JS!&@^!AQHAI×&@>!? i love that! thanks for all the support, guys <3

‍

๋࣭ ⭑⚝ if you want to ask me to make a bot, click here!

‍
